full_text:
Han Bian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Bian. Messenger of Lu Xun to Sun Quan, captured by Wei which forced Lu Xun to retreat. Han Bian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
